title: Bill 18 to put a potential stop to federal funding for municipal priorities
author: Aryn Toombs
notes: Detailed description of Bill 18 (2024 spring session) as introduced April 10 2024. Entities requiring prior provincial approval: 243 public agencies, crown corps, post-secondary institutions, school boards, health authorities, municipalities, housing bodies. Calgary Mayor Gondek: 'bureau of overreach.' Province did not consult municipalities before tabling. Tier 3 local outlet. Anchors EVT-070.
